text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I can't explain it, but something... not good has been following you around today.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Would you mind staying in your office... just until
tomorrow morning?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I'll be with you, so don't worry... I'll protect you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Knowing that Manhattan Cafe would never invent
a scary story for the sake of a prank, I follow her
advice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Night is falling as Manhattan Cafe keeps me
company while I work, when all of a sudden...
Trainer, I've finally found you! It's me, Tazuna!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa?
text_block_list.text:
I need to talk to you about the training track! It's
urgent! Could you please open the door?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Don't respond.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Yes. It's here.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The more you acknowledge it, the easier it
becomes... for it to cross the barrier... so stay
quiet...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa?
text_block_list.text:
Trainer? Why won't you open the door? You can
hear me, can't you? Hello?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa?
text_block_list.text: Trainer? Trainer? Trainer? Trainer? Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud, thud, thud! Bang! Bang! Bang!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the thumping on the door echoes throughout
the room, I keep quiet like Cafe told me to.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Click!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The lights suddenly go out. And that's not the
only strange occurrence...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rattle, rattle! THUMP. BANG. CRASH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear strange noises coming from every direction
of my office. It's as if some incredible force is
shaking the room from the outside...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...It's time to make a choice. We can hold out
until morning... or I can handle this right now.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to be a little forceful, but if you wish,
Trainer... I can make our visitor go away.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Whichever choice you make... I'll keep you safe...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Okay. Then, if you'll excuse me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe holds my hand. Our palms touch
and I feel something incredibly warm...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Focus on my warmth... and my voice... nothing
else...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: That way... you won't be scared of anything...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe guides me to a seat, and we sit
down together. Slowly but surely, the noises
around us begin to fade away...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I know it, it's bright again, and the peace
of dawn is washing over my office.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...You're safe now. Our visitor has given up and
left. I don't think you'll ever see her again...
choice_data_list: Thank you for protecting me all night.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Not at all. I just... did what I could.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The ordeal sent chills down my spine, but with
Manhattan Cafe's help, I start the next day
feeling warm and fuzzy inside...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Okay. Then all you have to do... is trust me and
watch...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe walks over to the door and
opens it without a moment's hesitation.

text_block_list.name: Eerie Sound
text_block_list.text:
VVVvvVZZZVvvvzZ!!! ZvZZVVZZvv!!!
VVVzzzVV!!!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear a piercing and indescribably unsettling
sound from the other side of the door.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Mumble, mumble...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe is addressing the sound, but for
some reason I can't make out a single word she's
saying...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, the lights turn back on and quiet
returns to the office...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...You're safe now. Our visitor has given up and
left. I don't think you'll ever see her again...
choice_data_list: What the heck did you do?
What the heck did you do?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
She gains power by remaining unseen... so I "saw"
her and spoke to her.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
You did well too. I'm sorry for putting you
through such a terrifying experience...
choice_data_list: No, thank you for protecting me.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Oh... It was nothing... I just did what I could.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Last night was a little frightening, but thanks to
Manhattan Cafe's resilient response, I feel
perfectly at ease as the morning comes.
